meaning: adj.可附上的,可连接的,可逮捕的
examples: Attachable keyboard drawers range from $30 to $200.
I am a fan of both the focusing lever and the larger attachable hood.
Allows any attachable item to be attached. Useful for attaching lanterns and fire torches.
It fits all three generations of full-size iPad (with or without a Smart Case) through attachable foam pads.
In addition, iBattz is introducing the waterproof AquaSeal Hi5 which combines a low profile waterproof case with an attachable power bank.
